issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' (checking Leader's type), not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The card text states 'If your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates"' which is a leader type check.

Missing second effect entirely. The card has a '[Once Per Turn]' triggered ability: 'If this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may give this Character −2000 power during this turn instead.' This requires a Counter trigger with conditional power reduction.
First effect trigger should be 'Trigger' or ability check, not 'OnPlay'. The Rush gain is conditional on leader type, not triggered by playing this card specifically.
